  nmlibdir: /usr/lib/NetworkManager
  nmdatadir: /usr/share/NetworkManager
  nmstatedir: /var/lib/NetworkManager
  nmrundir: /run/NetworkManager
  nmvpndir: /usr/lib64/NetworkManager
  nmplugindir: /usr/lib64/NetworkManager/1.56.0
  system_ca_path: /etc/ssl/certs
  dbus_conf_dir: /usr/share/dbus-1/system.d

Platform:
  session tracking: elogind
  suspend/resume: elogind
  policykit: true (default: true) (permissive modify.system)
  polkit-agent-helper-1: /usr/lib/polkit-1/polkit-agent-helper-1
  selinux: false
  systemd-journald: false (default: logging.backend=syslog)
  hostname persist: gentoo
  libaudit: false (default: logging.audit=false)

Features:
  wext: true
  wifi: true
  iwd:  false
  pppd: true /usr/sbin/pppd plugins:/usr/lib64/pppd/2.5.3
  jansson: yes (soname: libjansson.so.4)
  iptables: "/sbin/iptables"
  ip6tables: "/usr/bin/ip6tables"
  nft: "/sbin/nft"
  modprobe: "/usr/bin/modprobe"
  modemmanager-1: true
  mobile-broadband-provider-info-database: /usr/share/mobile-broadband-provider-info/serviceproviders.xml
  ofono: false
  concheck: true
  libteamdctl: false
  ovs: false
  nmcli: true
  nmtui: true
  nm-cloud-setup: true

Configuration_plugins (main.plugins=keyfile)
  ifcfg-rh: false (deprecated)
    default value of main.migrate-ifcfg-rh: false
  ifupdown: false

Handlers for /etc/resolv.conf:
  resolvconf: false
  netconfig: false

  config-dns-rc-manager-default: auto

DHCP clients (default internal):
  dhcpcd: false
  dhclient: false (deprecated)


Miscellaneous:
  have introspection: true
  build documentation and manpages: false
  firewalld zone for shared mode: true
  tests: no
  more-asserts: 0
  more-logging: false
  warning-level: 2
  valgrind: false
  code coverage: false
  LTO: true
  Linker garbage collection: false
  crypto: nss (have-gnutls: true, have-nss: true)
  sanitizers: none
  Mozilla Public Suffix List: false
  vapi: false
  readline: libreadline
